ocr_snippet: This is a Screening test. A Negative result implies that no anti HIV 1 or anti HIV 2 antibodies have been detected by this method. However, it does not rule out possibility of exposure to or infection with HIV 1 or 2. This could also mean that either patient has not been exposed with HIV 1 and 2 sample has been tested during window phase before development of detectable antibodies. Therefore, for a subject suspected of HIV Exposure, it is advisable to repeat the test after 3 months.
